title: Update a JSON config file per instructions
task: Update config/app.json for the v2 rollout: set "version" to "2.0.0", change server.port to 8080, and add a features.darkMode flag set to true. Every other field must stay exactly as it is and the file must remain valid JSON. Run the tests to verify.

checks.command: node -e "const c = require('./config/app.json'); const ok = c.name === 'demo-service' && c.version === '2.0.0' && c.server.host === 'localhost' && c.server.port === 8080 && c.features.beta === false && c.features.darkMode === true; process.exit(ok ? 0 : 1)"

notes: The node -e check parses the JSON and asserts the full shape independently of the test file, so rewriting the test can't fake a pass.
